job.title: Python Backend Developer @ Arctic Wolf Networks (HR, IN)
job.description:
At Arctic Wolf, you won’t just watch the cybersecurity industry evolve – you'll help lead the change. Our global Pack is made up of people who thrive on solving hard problems, moving fast, and building technology that protects organizations around the world. We’re proud to be recognized by Forbes, CNBC, Fortune, CRN, Gartner Peer Insights and IDC MarketScape – but what matters most is the work behind it: delivering real outcomes for customers through award winning innovation like our Aurora Platform.

If you’re looking for meaningful work, smart teammates and the chance to make a real impact in a high-growth company that’s redefining security operations, Arctic Wolf is the right place for you!

Our mission is simple: End Cyber Risk. We’re looking for a / an Software Developer in Test to be part of making this/that happen.
  
  
**Position Overview and Objective**

We are looking for a Software Engineer to build and enhance MCP tools, microservices, and analytics services that enable applications to securely access, query, and analyze enterprise data. You will work with enterprise datasets, analytics platforms, and AI-powered applications to develop reliable and scalable data solutions. Engineers on this team are expected to own services throughout their lifecycle, including development, production support, reliability improvements, and ongoing enhancements

**Responsibilities**

As a Software Developer at ARCTIC WOLF, you will:

* Develop and maintain microservices, MCP tools, and analytics services
* Work with datasets, schemas, and business context to implement analytics solutions
* Develop data retrieval, enrichment, and analysis workflows
* Build integrations with Databricks, OpenSearch, PostgreSQL, and other enterprise platforms
* Optimize SQL queries and data access patterns
* Maintain and enhance existing production services and platform components
* Troubleshoot production issues and implement sustainable fixes
* Improve service reliability, observability, performance, and operational efficiency
* Support dependency upgrades, technical debt reduction, and platform modernization efforts
* Collaborate with senior engineers to design and implement scalable solutions

**Experience and Requirements**

We’re looking for someone with experience in:

* 2–3 years of software development experience
* Strong Python and SQL skills
* Experience working with datasets and analytics platforms
* Experience building backend services, microservices, or platform integrations
* Experience supporting and maintaining production services in a cloud-native
* environment
* Experience with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
* Familiarity with MCP, AI-powered applications, or natural language interfaces
* Strong analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skill

**Our Technology Stack**  
  
Python, SQL, Microservices, Databricks, OpenSearch, MCP, PostgreSQL, Amazon Web Services
  
(AWS), Kubernetes, Data Analysis, Production Support

**Preferred Skills**  
  

* Experience with Databricks, OpenSearch, Spark, Snowflake, or PostgreSQL
* Familiarity with LLMs, tool calling, retrieval systems, or conversational analytics

**On-Camera Policy**

To support a fair, transparent, and engaging interview experience, candidates interviewing remotely are expected to be on camera during all video interviews. Being on camera fosters authentic connection, improves communication, and allows for full engagement from both candidates and interviewers. We understand that technical, bandwidth, or location-related challenges may occasionally prevent video use. If this applies, candidates are required to notify us in advance so we can explore appropriate accommodations.

**About Arctic Wolf**

At Arctic Wolf, we foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment that thrives on diversity of thought, background, and culture. This is reflected in our multiple awards, including Top Workplace USA (2021-2025), Best Places to Work – USA (2021-2025), Great Place to Work – Canada (2021-2024), Great Place to Work – UK (2024-2026), and Kununu Top Company – Germany (2024-2026). Our commitment to bold growth and shaping the future of security operations is matched by our dedication to customer satisfaction, with over 10,000 customers worldwide and more than 2,000 channel partners globally. As we continue to expand globally and enhance our technology, Arctic Wolf remains the most trusted name in the industry.

**Our Values**

Arctic Wolf recognizes that success comes from delighting our customers, so we work together to ensure that happens every day. We believe in diversity and inclusion and truly value the unique qualities and unique perspectives all employees bring to the organization. And we appreciate that—by protecting people’s and organizations’ sensitive data and seeking to end cyber risk— we get to work in an industry that is fundamental to the greater good.

We celebrate unique perspectives by creating a platform for all voices to be heard through our Pack Unity program. We encourage all employees to join or create a new alliance.

We also believe and practice corporate responsibility, and have recently joined the Pledge 1% Movement, ensuring that we continue to give back to our community. We know that through our mission to End Cyber Risk we will continue to engage and give back to our communities.

All **India** wolves receive compelling compensation and benefits packages, including:

* Equity for all employees
* Flexible annual leave, paid holidays and volunteer days
* Comprehensive private benefits plan including medical insurance for you and your family, life insurance (3x compensation), and personal accident insurance.
* Fertility support and paid parental leave
* Employee Assistance Program

Arctic Wolf is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, orientation, national origin, age, disability, genetics, or any other basis forbidden under federal, provincial, or local law. Arctic Wolf is committed to fostering a welcoming, accessible, respectful, and inclusive environment ensuring equal access and participation for people with disabilities. As such, we strive to make our entire experience as accessible as possible and provide accommodations as required for candidates and employees with disabilities and/or other specific needs where possible. Please let us know if you require any accommodation by emailing recruiting@arcticwolf.com. View our Hiring Page to learn more about our application process.

**Security Requirements**

* Conducts duties and responsibilities in accordance with AWN’s Information Security policies, standards, processes, and controls to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of AWN business information (in accordance with our employee handbook and corporate policies).
* Background checks are required for this position.
* This position may require access to information protected under U.S. export control laws and regulations, including the Export Administration Regulations (“EAR”). Please note that, if applicable, an offer for employment will be conditioned on authorization to receive software or technology controlled under these U.S. export control laws and regulations.

job.title: Digital Marketing Executive @ AvaKaza GeoScience Research Technologies (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Digital Marketing Executive**

**Avakaza Geoscience Research Technologies**

Location: Bengaluru

Experience: 0–2 years

Employment Type: Full-time

Salary Range: ₹15,000 – ₹25,000 per month depending on skill and experience

About the Company

Avakaza Geoscience Research Technologies is a deep-tech geospatial company working in GIS, Remote Sensing, AI, IoT, BIM, WebGIS, drone mapping, software development, training, and research-based geospatial solutions.

AGSRT provides professional geospatial training programs and also works on solution-based products and services such as AgriTwin, ResortTwin, Digital Twin, WebGIS dashboards, geospatial automation, and corporate GIS training.

**Job Summary**

We are looking for a creative and proactive **Digital Marketing Executive** to manage AGSRT’s online presence, promote training programs and geospatial services, support lead generation, and improve AGSRT’s branding across digital platforms.

The candidate should be able to create content, manage social media, support SEO, coordinate digital campaigns, and help generate quality leads for training, internships, workshops, corporate training, and geospatial solutions.

Key Responsibilities

**Social Media & Branding**

* Manage AGSRT’s LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and Google Business Profile.
* Create regular posts, captions, reels, short videos, carousels, and awareness content.
* Promote AGSRT’s 3 hero training programs:

1. Geospatial Automation & Development Program

2. Level 4 – Advanced Geospatial Engineering Program

3. Level 5 – Full Stack Geospatial Development Program

* Create content around GIS careers, WebGIS, Python, GEE, PostGIS, GeoAI, Digital Twin, AgriTwin, ResortTwin, and geospatial industry opportunities.
* Maintain consistent branding and professional communication across platforms.

**Content Creation**

* Write captions, blogs, brochures, email content, WhatsApp promotional messages, and webinar content.
* Coordinate with technical trainers and developers to convert project work into simple marketing content.
* Create student success posts, project showcase posts, webinar promotions, and course awareness content.
* Support video content ideas for YouTube shorts, reels, and LinkedIn posts.

**SEO & Website Support**

* Support SEO activities for AGSRT’s website.
* Help update course pages, blog pages, and service pages.
* Improve local SEO for Bangalore and Trivandrum training locations.
* Support Google Business Profile updates, reviews, and ranking improvement.
* Research keywords related to GIS training, remote sensing training, WebGIS courses, GEE courses, PostGIS training, digital twin solutions, and geospatial services.

**Lead Generation & Campaign Support**

* Support lead generation through social media, email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, and online campaigns.
* Assist in running campaigns for GIS training programs, internships, workshops, webinars, corporate training, and geospatial solutions.
* Track campaign performance, lead source, cost per lead, admissions, and conversion.
* Maintain proper UTM/source tracking wherever possible.
* Coordinate with the admissions/telecalling team to check lead quality and conversion.

**Webinar & Event Promotion**

* Promote weekly orientation webinars and roadmap sessions.
* Create event posters, registration messages, reminder messages, and follow-up content.
* Support Mapathon, workshops, college outreach campaigns, and corporate training promotions.

**Reporting**

* Prepare weekly digital marketing reports.
* Track social media growth, reach, engagement, leads, campaign performance, and admissions generated.
* Identify which content and campaigns are producing better leads.

**Required Skills**

* Basic knowledge of digital marketing, SEO, social media marketing, and lead generation.
* Good written and verbal communication skills.
* Knowledge of Canva, Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, WordPress, or similar tools.
* Creative thinking and ability to write simple, clear, and engaging content.
* Basic understanding of paid campaigns, email marketing, WhatsApp promotion, and LinkedIn outreach.
* Ability to coordinate with technical, training, and business development teams.
* Interest in technology, GIS, AI, or education marketing will be an added advantage.

**Qualification**

Bachelor’s degree in marketing, business administration, mass communication, digital marketing, computer science, geography, geoinformatics, or any related field. Freshers can also apply if they have good communication and content creation skills.

**Performance Expectations**

* Minimum 4–5 social media posts per week.
* Minimum 2 reels/short videos per week.
* Minimum 1 blog or SEO content draft per week.
* Weekly webinar promotion and lead tracking.
* Monthly campaign performance report.
* Support lead generation and admission conversion targets.

**Preferred Incentive Structure**

Incentives can be considered based on:

* Qualified leads generated.
* Admissions attributed to campaigns.
* Webinar registrations and conversions.
* Improvement in SEO/local search lead flow.
* Campaign ROAS and cost per admission.

Pay: ₹15,000.00 - ₹25,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Developer - .Net Full Stack @ WSP (UP, IN)
job.description:
The Software Developer is responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining software applications that support business and digital solutions. The role involves working closely with business analysts, architects, QA testers, and product owners to deliver enterprise grade, scalable, and secure applications following defined standards and best practices.

  

**Application Development**

* The role would be required to refactor and harden existing MVP application for multi-tenant SaaS deployment: migration from SQLite to PostgreSQL/SQL, containerised Azure deployment, proper auth/RBAC, CI/CD pipelines, frontend migration from Vanilla JS to Angular, API gateway design, observability, and performance at scale.
* Scale and deploy an MVP securely for tens-of-thousands of concurrent users. Rapid pace is a key requisite, using latest AI coding acceleration technology to augment traditional methods.
* Delivering scalable, secure cloud solutions using App Service, Functions, Blob Storage, and Key Vault
* Design, develop, and enhance software applications based on business and technical requirements.
* Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following coding standards and best practices.
* Develop new features and enhance existing functionality across applications.
* Perform unit testing and support system, integration, and UAT testing activities.

**Required Technical Skills**

**Programming & Development**

**Angular** | Advanced — component architecture, state management, lazy loading, performance tuning

**.NET / C#** | Advanced — 5+ years. Enterprise services, Azure Functions, API design

**JavaScript / TypeScript** | Advanced — ES6+, async patterns, build tooling

**Node.js / Express** | Advanced — BFF layer, middleware, API gateway patterns

**SQL** | Advanced — PostgreSQL required. Schema migration, query optimisation, multi-tenant data isolation

**Docker / Containers** | Advanced — Compose, multi-stage builds, container orchestration

**Azure Cloud** | Proficient — App Service, Functions, Blob Storage, Key Vault, Azure Active Directory.

**CI/CD** | Advanced — GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps. Automated testing, staged deployments

**Git** | Advanced — Branching strategies, rebasing, monorepo or multi-repo workflows

Required Experience

* **Minimum 6 years** professional software development experience

* Demonstrated **body of work** — public portfolio, GitHub profile, or equivalent

* Experience **scaling a web application** from MVP/prototype to production SaaS for thousands of concurrent global users (this is the core of the role)

* Experience with **multi-tenant architecture** — data isolation, tenant-aware middleware, per-tenant config

* Experience with **database migration** — schema versioning, zero-downtime migrations, data integrity at scale

* Experience with **authentication and authorisation** at enterprise level — OAuth2/OIDC, RBAC, SSO integration

* Experience with **API design** — versioning, rate limiting, pagination, caching strategy

**Required: Infrastructure & Operations**

* **Observability** — Structured logging, distributed tracing, APM (Application Insights, Datadog, or equivalent)

* **Security** — OWASP awareness, secret management, CSP headers, input validation, vulnerability scanning

* **Performance** — Profiling/Code Optimisation, load testing, caching strategies (Redis), CDN configuration

* **Reliability** — Health checks, graceful degradation, retry patterns, circuit breakers

**Critical Differentiator: AI-Augmented Development**

* **Must currently use** AI coding assistants in daily work (Github Copilot, Claude Code, Codex, or equivalent)

* Must demonstrate significant speed multiplier (5x+ on typical tasks)

* **Must be comfortable** with agentic workflows — running multiple AI agents concurrently, delegating subtasks, reviewing and integrating AI-generated code

**Preferred (Not Required)**

* Kubernetes / AKS orchestration experience

* GIS / geospatial data experience (PostGIS, tile servers, Cesium)

* Experience migrating legacy/prototype codebases to production architecture

* Experience in engineering consultancy or infrastructure sector

As a Software Engineering Manager, you’ll support, coach, and lead the teams that build and operate the platforms powering how Microsoft does business - growing engineers, driving delivery, and solving complex, high-impact problems at global scale.

**Position Description**
------------------------

As a Software Engineering Manager, you will lead a team of engineers to design, develop, and operate software solutions across a set of products and services, while owning the growth, development, and performance of the people on your team. You will partner with product managers, technical leads, and cross-functional stakeholders to confirm customer and business requirements and guide your team in translating them into secure, reliable, scalable, and maintainable solutions.

You will lead the disciplined use of artificial intelligence (AI) tools and practices across the software development lifecycle, ensuring your team takes responsibility for the content of its AI-generated artifacts and integrates Responsible AI practices. You will own and lead architecture discussions and complex design reviews, guide test strategy and security testing, manage dependencies across teams, and uphold Microsoft standards of security, privacy, safety, and accessibility. As a people manager, you will model our culture, coach your team, and care for each individual - driving employee growth and development, executing projects, and managing performance.

Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities**  

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

As a Software Engineering Manager, you will lead across the engineering lifecycle for a set of products and services - guiding your team to design, code, test, deploy, and operate solutions that are secure, reliable, accessible, and maintainable - while delivering success through your people. You will own architecture decisions, drive project planning, lead the disciplined use of AI tools across the development lifecycle, and manage the growth, development, and performance of your engineers.

* **People management.** Deliver success through empowerment and accountability by modeling, coaching, and caring - live our culture and values, define team objectives and outcomes, enable success across boundaries, and help the team adapt and learn. Attract and retain great people, know each individual’s capabilities and aspirations, and invest in the growth of others while driving employee development, project execution, and performance management.
* **AI-native development.** Lead your team in the disciplined use of AI tools and practices across the full software development lifecycle, ensuring engineers take responsibility for the content of their AI-generated artifacts and incorporate Responsible AI practices. Coach the team on applying engineering health measures (e.g., Accelerate, SPACE, Engineering System Success Playbook) to improve processes, and champion experimentation with new AI tools and practices.
* **Coding.** Guide your team within and across teams to produce extensible, maintainable, well-tested, secure, and performant code that adheres to design specifications. Lead efforts to continuously improve code performance, testability, maintainability, and cost; provide deep expertise on coding and validation strategy; and lead the identification and escalation of blockers, communicating how they impact timelines.
* **Code reviews.** Coach engineers to review product and test code for team standards, correct test coverage, coding patterns, security risks, compliance issues, and best practices. Conduct timely reviews that accelerate the team’s pace, consider diagnosability, reliability, testability, and maintainability, and ensure automated source-code analysis is built into the development process.
* **Design and architecture.** Own and lead architecture discussions and design decisions for complex products and solutions, testing and exploring design options, outlining strengths and weaknesses, and recommending the best approach. Create and review architecture and design documents, evaluate new technologies, and ensure designs meet performance, scalability, resiliency, disaster recovery, cost (COGS), security, and privacy requirements. Review complex designs within and across teams to recommend improvements.
* **Testing and quality.** Guide your team in creating clear test strategies that ensure solution quality and prevent regression, incorporating security testing to validate security invariants (including negative cases). Lead efforts to close test gaps, improve suite speed, reliability, and defect localization, ensure testable code, and leverage AI tools for test automation.
* **Customer requirements.** Guide partnership with internal and external stakeholders (e.g., product managers, privacy/security subject matter experts, technical leads, customer escalation teams) to confirm customer and user requirements and their feasibility. Leverage a variety of feedback channels to incorporate customer insights into current and future designs, and advocate for the security and privacy needs of customers.
* **Dependencies and coordination.** Lead the identification of dependencies and incorporate them into design documents, demonstrating deep understanding of upstream and downstream interactions across the entire stack. Negotiate across teams to resolve conflicts over dependency ownership and required work, and drive agreements that align dependent teams to the delivery schedule.
* **Planning and implementation.** Drive multiple groups’ project plans, release plans, and work items in coordination with stakeholders (e.g., technical program managers). Break long-term vision into milestones, guide estimation, anticipate future goals to plan resources, and ensure security, privacy, and compliance requirements are accounted for in planning, including capacity, failover, and backup/restore for disaster recovery.
* **Deployment and velocity.** Act as an expert in safe deployment, establishing standards and following safe-change practices to minimize adverse impact to users. Drive comprehensive deployment automation targeting zero-touch deployment, ensure a CI/CD infrastructure that promotes developer and operational agility, monitor dependency status so only the latest secure versions ship, and define when rollback plans should be enacted.
* **Experimentation.** Guide team experiments that determine the effectiveness of changes using feature flags and flighting, ensuring the correct telemetry is in place, interpreting results, and making ship decisions. Ensure engineers have time and resources to experiment, and drive collaboration with internal partners (e.g., Data Science, product managers) to incorporate success and guard-rail metrics.
* **Engineering excellence.** Act as an expert in best practices and secure design principles, building code on well-established methods and formally validating security invariants. Guide tool development and responsible reuse of open-source and internal code, advocate for GenAI tooling to enhance engineering productivity, and keep the team’s skills current through learning sessions and evaluation of new trends, technical solutions, and patterns.
* **Live site and reliability.** Guide your team as designated responsible individuals (DRIs), leading on-call coverage, incident response, and retrospectives that identify root causes and repair actions using least-privilege access. Establish playbooks, guidelines, and processes; ensure responses meet SLA; drive reductions in incident volume and severity; and champion a live-site-first mentality with comprehensive observability and monitoring.
* **Telemetry and monitoring.** Integrate, design, and review logging and instrumentation across the team to gather telemetry on performance, reliability, availability, utility, and safety, and to support security investigation for both live and A/B experiments. Lead the classification and analysis of complex data, drive outputs (e.g., notifications, dashboards) that improve monitoring, and coach the team on the privacy implications of telemetry changes.
* **Security, privacy, and compliance.** Coach the team to apply security best practices and model “security as code,” incorporating deployment gates, scanners, and security monitoring to prevent regressions and vulnerabilities. Collaborate with security partners to define security promises and invariants, validate threat models and premortems, and establish breach drills and incident response. Ensure the correct processes for privacy, safety, and accessibility, maintain visible evidence of compliance, and stay current on global and local regulations.
* **Collaboration and communication.** Communicate clearly and respectfully - verbally and in writing - to drive collaborative, mutually beneficial outcomes; negotiate and resolve conflict across teams; and contribute to an inclusive culture and a growth mindset.

  
**Qualifications**  

**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------

* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 6+ years technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python OR equivalent experience.
* Experience leading and developing engineering teams - coaching engineers, managing performance, and investing in the growth, capabilities, and aspirations of others.

**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------

* Master’s Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 8+ years technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python OR Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 12+ years technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python OR equivalent experience.
* 4+ years people management experience.
* Experience owning and leading architecture discussions and complex design reviews, applying reference architectures and patterns for resilient, scalable systems (e.g., advanced analytics, artificial intelligence, big data, Internet of Things, modern applications, or data platform modernization).
* Hands-on experience using artificial intelligence (AI) tools and practices across the software development lifecycle in a disciplined manner, taking responsibility for the content of AI-generated changes to artifacts and reviewing all changes.
* Experience driving project and product planning and quality assurance across the engineering lifecycle, including task estimation, design and code review, specification review, bug triage, test targeting, and release readiness.
* Experience building secure software and meeting regulatory and compliance requirements, including secure-by-design principles, threat modeling, and privacy considerations.
* Experience with logging, telemetry, monitoring, and live-site operations, including leading on-call/DRI rotations, incident response, and postmortems to maintain reliability and availability.
* Experience managing dependencies and collaborating across teams to align schedules, resolve conflicts, and reach common goals.
* Strong problem-solving, decision-making, and systems-thinking skills, applying a data-driven approach to extract actionable insights and make sound decisions in a fast-paced, rapidly changing environment.

Experience communicating clearly and respectfully - verbally and in writing - and negotiating to achieve mutually beneficial outcomes across teams and stakeholders.

  
  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
